Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naraka Gate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — A Naraka Gate can only be opened at certain points.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Naraka Gate is a way to travel into Myria.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The Naraka Gate is held open by two Naraka Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Indirial turns to the Naraka Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Naraka Gate is a gate that can be open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Leah walked toward the Naraka Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Naraka Gate is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — The Naraka Gate opens and releases a screaming orange fireball from the Territory's depths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — People were scrambling out of the Naraka Gate behind Grandmaster Naraka.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
